regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Fraunhofer IVV: PE/EVOH Class C (38/100); mono-PE Class B but 4-day shelf life reduction; paper-MAP Class A option being evaluated.

regulations.title: Verpackungsdurchführungsgesetz Amendment
regulations.summary: 2.0x EPR multiplier for Class C confirmed in draft; Munich bread bag EPR exposure increases from EUR 52k to EUR 104k/year.

regulations.title: Austrian EPR — ARA
regulations.summary: Q1 payment EUR 4,210 processed 28 January 2026; FY2025 quantity declaration in preparation for March.

regulations.title: Lieferkettensorgfaltspflichtengesetz
regulations.summary: IOI Corporation palm oil classified substantial risk; §9 notification to be issued 5 February; RSPO alternative required within 60 days.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: E1 confirmed material: Munich oven fleet 42,000 MWh/year below BAT; transition plan required; oven efficiency audit commissioned.
